# LeadFlow CRM
# https://www.leadflowcrm.in
# Facebook lead distribution software for Indian sales teams and network marketing distributors.

## Product
LeadFlow CRM is a SaaS platform that automatically distributes Facebook leads to paid subscribers using a round-robin algorithm. Plans are leads-based (quota exhausted = plan expired). Built for network marketing teams, Forever Living distributors, and Indian SMB sales teams.

## Key Pages

### Home
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/
- Description: Main landing page — product overview, pricing, how it works, testimonials from Indian sales managers.

### Login / Signup
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/login
- Description: User authentication page.

### Contact
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/contact
- Description: Contact form and support details.

## Blog — Lead Management Guides for Indian Teams

### Blog Index
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/blog.html
- Description: All blog articles — lead management tips for Indian sales teams in Hinglish.

### Lead Flow Management Guide
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/blog/lead-flow-management-guide-india.html
- Title: Lead Flow Management — Complete Guide for Indian Sales Teams 2026
- Keywords: lead flow, lead flow management, Facebook lead distribution India
- Summary: What lead flow means, why Indian sales teams struggle with it, 5 components of a proper lead flow system, Facebook to CRM flow explained.

### Network Marketing CRM Guide
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/blog/network-marketing-crm-guide-india.html
- Title: Network Marketing CRM India 2026 — Kaunsa Choose Kare
- Keywords: network marketing crm, mlm crm india, crm for network marketing teams
- Summary: Honest comparison of Zoho vs HubSpot vs LeadFlow CRM for Indian network marketing and MLM teams.

### FLP Leads Guide
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/blog/flp-leads-generate-kaise-kare.html
- Title: FLP Leads Generate Kaise Kare — Proven System 2026
- Keywords: flp leads, forever living leads, flp lead generation india
- Summary: How to generate leads for Forever Living (FLP) business via Facebook ads, Instagram, WhatsApp, and automatic distribution systems.

### Forever Leads Distribution System
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/blog/forever-leads-distribution-system.html
- Title: Forever Leads Distribution System — Auto Assign Karo
- Keywords: forever leads, forever living lead distribution, flp team lead management
- Summary: How to stop manual WhatsApp-based lead distribution and build an automated system for Forever Living teams.

### Lead Distribution Software India
- URL: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/blog/lead-distribution-software-india.html
- Title: Lead Distribution Software India — Best Options 2026
- Keywords: lead distribution software india, lead distribution management software india
- Summary: Comparison of LeadSquared, Salesforce, Zoho CRM, and LeadFlow CRM for Indian SMB and network marketing teams.

## Legal Pages
- Privacy Policy: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/terms
- Refund Policy: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/refund
- Shipping Policy: https://www.leadflowcrm.in/shipping

## Plans & Pricing (as of 2026)
- Starter: ₹999 / 55 leads (5 leads/day, 10 days)
- Supervisor: ₹1,999 / 115 leads (7 leads/day, 15 days)
- Weekly Boost: ₹1,999 / 92 leads (12 leads/day, 7 days)
- Turbo Boost: ₹2,499 / 108 leads (14 leads/day, 7 days)
- Manager: ₹3,499 / 150 leads (8 leads/day, 20 days)

## Technical
- Frontend: React 18 SPA on Cloudflare Pages
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Edge Functions)
- Payments: Razorpay
- API Proxy: https://api.leadflowcrm.in (Cloudflare Worker)
